page: Microsoft Azure E32nds_v6 is an Endv6-family virtual machine configured with 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of memory. Built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel processor, this instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The hardware configuration provides a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, positioning it as a memory-optimized resource for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute resources.

This server type includes 1890 GB of local storage and is designated as premium storage capable. It is classified as network optimized, which supports high-throughput data transfers and low-latency network operations. The inclusion of local storage and premium storage capabilities allows for high-performance disk I/O operations, though it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E32nds_v6 offers a high density of memory and local storage per virtual core, making it a viable option for memory-intensive applications without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware. The combination of 256.0 GB of RAM, 32 dedicated vCPUs, and 1890 GB of local storage makes this instance suitable for relational databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise applications, and data-intensive processing workloads.
description: The Microsoft Azure E32nds_v6 is an Endv6-family virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. Powered by an Intel x86_64 processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance is designed for memory-intensive and network-optimized workloads. It includes 1890 GB of local storage and supports premium storage configurations, enhancing disk I/O capabilities. The server does not feature integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Qualitatively, the E32nds_v6 provides high resource density for memory-bound tasks, making it a cost-efficient choice for database hosting, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications that require significant memory capacity alongside dedicated compute resources.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel processors, substantial local storage, and high-throughput networking for demanding database workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
1890 GB of local storage with premium storage capability
